subcodes.first_line: O true handmaiden of God! Be thou not sorrowful, neither yield to weariness and despair, let not thy heart be broken, for trials must needs arise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز صادق الهی محزون مشو ملال و کلال میار دلشکسته مگرد لابدّ از حصول مشکلاتست
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all
